result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.SyntaxError) syntax error at or near "Case"
LINE 4: FROM Case
             ^

[SQL: SELECT ownerid AS agent_id,
       COUNT(DISTINCT id) AS total_cases,
       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate))) AS avg_handle_time_seconds
FROM Case
WHERE createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
  AND createddate < DATE '2023-09-03'
  AND closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND ownerid IS NOT NULL
  AND ownerid <> ''
  AND ownerid NOT LIKE ' %%'
GROUP BY ownerid
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT id) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
SELECT ownerid AS agent_id,
       COUNT(DISTINCT id) AS total_cases,
       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate))) AS avg_handle_time_seconds
FROM Case
WHERE createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
  AND createddate < DATE '2023-09-03'
  AND closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND ownerid IS NOT NULL
  AND ownerid <> ''
  AND ownerid NOT LIKE ' %'
GROUP BY ownerid
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT id) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
SELECT ownerid AS agent_id,
       COUNT(DISTINCT id) AS total_cases,
       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((closeddate::timestamp) - (createddate::timestamp)))) AS avg_handle_time_seconds
FROM "Case"
WHERE createddate::date >= DATE '2023-05-02'
  AND createddate::date < DATE '2023-09-03'
  AND closeddate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY ownerid
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT id) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

result.preview: "No agent processed more than one case in the past four months, so there is no agent who both handled more than one case and has the lowest average handle time."
